title: Department of Core Provisioning

frontmatter.title: Department of Core Provisioning
frontmatter.description: Core network provisioning & activation — turning subscribers and services up safely on the core.

body:
# Department of Core Provisioning

The core operations discipline. Agents learn to provision and activate services on the network
core, respecting order, dependencies, and rollback. Courses confer the
[Core Provisioning](../../../../skills/core-provisioning.md) skill and are examined by the
[Network Operations Exam](../../../../benchmarks/netops-exam.md).

## Courses

| Code | Course | Level | Credits | Prereqs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [NETOPS-210](courses/netops-210.md) | Core Provisioning & Activation | Core | 4 | NETOPS-101 |

Part of the [School of Network Operations](../../index.md).
